summary: Made two surgical seam edits: one to carry the hidden recorder forward from Chapter 3 into Chapter 4's opening, and one to angle Marisol's exit toward sanitation stores so the close feeds more directly into Chapter 5's contamination-stoppage setup.
edits: Added a brief opening sentence noting the recorder under Marisol's shirt to preserve continuity from the prior chapter's closing beat.
Adjusted the final sentence so Marisol's movement aims toward sanitation stores, tightening the handoff into the next chapter's bleach-and-release-board opening.
